sections.a_eyebrow: Animation · Type as Hero · Moderate Motion · Interactive · Modern
sections.a_description: Character-by-character reveals, blinking cursors, and the mesmerizing rhythm of text that types itself into existence — Text Reveal Typing Effect design makes typography the main event. The dark editor-like backgrounds and monospace fonts create a terminal-inspired stage where headlines perform their entrance one character at a time, turning simple text into a captivating animated sequence.

This text-forward style powers developer portfolios, CLI tool landing pages, coding bootcamp sites, and tech startup hero sections. You'll see it on personal developer sites where names type themselves out, SaaS landing pages cycling through use cases with a typing animation, AI product demos simulating real-time text generation, and creative coding showcases where text reveals are choreographed to music or scroll position.

a_image_cover.alt: Text Reveal Typing Effect style use case illustration
Text Reveal Typing Effect style use case illustration
Text Reveal Typing Effect style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The text-forward, terminal-inspired aesthetic of typing-effect websites — headlines that type themselves character by character, blinking cursors, and text that reveals as if being written in real time. Background: near-black (#0d1117) — the dark background of a code editor or terminal where text is the star. The .inner panel has a slightly lighter background (#161b22) with a 1px border (#30363d) and 8px border-radius — resembling a code editor panel. Colors: bright green (#58a6ff) as the primary accent — the color of links and commands in modern dark terminals. Soft white (#c9d1d9) for headings, medium gray (#8b949e) for body text. The aesthetic is developer-adjacent — text isn't just content, it's performance, typed out with cursor blinks and line-by-line reveals. Set in Source Code Pro — Adobe's monospace font designed for code readability, connecting the typing animation to its terminal origins. Heading at weight 600, 24px, line-height 1.3, color #c9d1d9. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #58a6ff. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.7, color #8b949e. Buttons: primary — blue (#58a6ff), dark text (#0d1117), 6px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, blue border. Alternatives: Fira Code (with ligatures), JetBrains Mono (modern monospace).
